title: NAVAL-SEM
description: NAVAL-SEM is a free, fully offline desktop application for Structural Equation Modelling (SEM). It supports PLS-SEM and CB-SEM (ML, WLS), visual drag-and-drop model building with auto-generated lavaan syntax, bootstrapping with confidence intervals, HTMT, AVE, Composite Reliability, Cronbach's Alpha, Fornell-Larcker discriminant validity, and fit indices (CFI, RMSEA, SRMR, χ², AIC, BIC, R²). Accepts CSV, Excel, and SPSS data files. No internet connection required after installation. Designed as an accessible alternative to commercial SEM tools for researchers and students globally.
notes: If you use NAVAL-SEM in academic research, please cite this software.
